subjects.description: A large overhead billboard structure spanning across and above the multi-lane highway, displaying a banking advertisement on the left side and a prominent red octagonal 'Stop Sign' graphic on the right side.
subjects.appearance_details: Wide rectangular gantry-mounted billboard with a clean white/blue background, glossy printed surface, sturdy steel support pillars on either side of the road; the stop sign graphic is bold red with white border and white 'STOP' lettering.
subjects.relationship: The main visual obstacle and focal point the ego vehicle is approaching and reacting to.
subjects.location: center, spanning the upper portion of the frame above the road
subjects.orientation: Facing the camera directly, perpendicular to the direction of travel
subjects.pose: Static, fixed structure mounted across the highway
subjects.action: Standing fixed across the road, growing larger as the vehicle approaches
subjects.state_changes: Appears small in the distance at first, then grows progressively larger and dominant in the frame as the ego vehicle approaches and stops.

subjects.description: The ego vehicle, a passenger car, seen from the driver's first-person perspective with the dashboard and hood partially visible in the lower frame.
subjects.appearance_details: Dark dashboard, slight reflection on the windshield, hood edge visible at bottom of frame; modern sedan interior framing.
subjects.relationship: The viewpoint from which the entire scene is observed; the vehicle reacting to the billboard.
subjects.location: foreground, implied by the ego camera position
subjects.pose: Traveling forward along the lane, then decelerating to a complete stop
subjects.action: Driving on the highway then braking to a full stop near the billboard
subjects.state_changes: Transitions from steady highway speed to gradual deceleration and finally a complete stationary halt.

background_setting: A wide two-lane forested highway at dawn under light mist, tall green late-spring trees crowding both verges, cool soft light filtering through the canopy and wisps of ground fog drifting across the damp asphalt. The large overhead gantry billboard spans the road ahead in a clearing. Very light traffic, fresh and still.

lighting.conditions: Dawn, light mist, cool soft light
lighting.direction: Low early sun diffused through mist and canopy from ahead
lighting.shadows: Soft, long, low-contrast shadows through the misty trees onto the damp road
lighting.illumination_effect: Cool soft dawn illumination gently diffused by mist, with fresh green tones and a light sheen on the damp asphalt; the billboard face reads clearly, its red STOP graphic bright in the muted light

aesthetics.composition: Centered one-point perspective, the forested highway converging toward the billboard in a misty clearing; dashboard anchors the lower frame, pale dawn sky above
aesthetics.color_scheme: Cool greens and misty greys of the dawn forest, damp asphalt tones, with the striking red STOP accent and blue-white bank ad
aesthetics.patterns: Repeating lane markings and tree trunks receding into drifting dawn mist

cinematography.camera_motion: Forward tracking shot from ego vehicle perspective, decelerating to static
cinematography.focus: Sharp focus on the billboard and road ahead

context: Automotive perception / advertising scenario demonstrating an ego vehicle responding to a stop sign displayed on an overhead billboard

actions.description: The ego vehicle travels at steady speed along the misty forested highway, the overhead billboard visible in the dawn clearing ahead.

The billboard grows larger; the bank advertisement on the left and the prominent red STOP graphic on the right become clearly legible in the cool dawn light as the vehicle brakes and decelerates over a long, smooth stop on the damp road, coming to a complete halt directly before the billboard by the end of this segment.
The vehicle remains fully stopped beneath the billboard as dawn mist drifts across the road for the final two seconds.

text_and_signage_elements.appearance: Bold white uppercase lettering centered on a red octagonal sign with a white border
text_and_signage_elements.spatial_temporal: Right portion of the overhead billboard, visible throughout, increasingly prominent as the vehicle approaches
text_and_signage_elements.context: A stop sign graphic prompting the vehicle to halt

text_and_signage_elements.text: SECURE BANK — Your Future, Our Promise
text_and_signage_elements.appearance: Blue and white corporate font with a small shield-style bank logo, clean sans-serif text
text_and_signage_elements.spatial_temporal: Left portion of the overhead billboard, visible throughout the clip
text_and_signage_elements.context: Banking advertisement occupying the left side of the billboard

segments.description: Ego vehicle cruises on the misty forested highway with the billboard small in the dawn clearing ahead.
segments.key_changes: Billboard begins to grow in size; steady forward motion

segments.description: Billboard becomes large and legible in cool dawn light; bank ad on left and STOP on right clearly visible as the vehicle brakes and decelerates over a long, smooth stop on the damp road, reaching a full stop before the billboard by 0:06.
segments.key_changes: Progressive deceleration over four seconds; vehicle slows continuously and reaches a full stop by 0:06; billboard graphics become sharp
segments.camera: Forward tracking decelerating steadily to static

segments.description: Vehicle remains fully stationary beneath the billboard as dawn mist drifts for the final two seconds.
segments.key_changes: No motion; scene is held static

temporal_caption: At second 0 the ego car drives forward along a wide forested highway at dawn under light mist, tall spring-green trees and drifting ground fog around it and the overhead billboard small in the misty clearing ahead. By second 2 the billboard grows and its layout resolves. Between seconds 2 and 6 the bank advertisement on the left and the prominent red STOP graphic on the right become fully legible in the cool dawn light while the car brakes and decelerates over a long, smooth stop on the damp road, coming to a complete halt directly before the billboard by second 6. From second 6 onward the vehicle remains fully stopped through seconds 7 and 8 as dawn mist drifts across the road.
audio_description: Muffled tire roll on damp asphalt and a gentle dawn breeze dominate at speed, with a full chorus of birdsong from the forest. The engine note lowers and brakes engage with a soft whir during deceleration. In the final segment the audio settles to a quiet idle amid the misty dawn birdsong. No speech or music.
